start.speaker: Piety
start.text: Tell me what you have seen since you set out. Naming the mercies you have met will steady you for what lies ahead.
start.text_zh: 把你出发以来所见的告诉我。一一数算你所遇见的恩典，会让你为前路站立得稳。

choices.text: I sank in the Slough, and a hand called Help lifted me out.
choices.text_zh: 我曾陷在泥潭，一只叫「帮助」的手把我拉了出来。

choices.text: I came to the Cross, and the burden rolled from my back into the tomb.
choices.text_zh: 我来到十字架前，重担从我背上滚落，进了空坟。

bless.speaker: Piety
bless.text: The same grace that brought you this far will carry you down the valley and up to the City. Go armed, not afraid.
bless.text_zh: 那把你带到这里的同一恩典，必带你下那幽谷，并上到天城。披甲而去，不要惧怕。
